step_description: Blocking session chains and lock wait details
narrative_hint: All three blocked sessions are waiting on the same resource — RID 5:1:182844 which is a row in the FactSales table being locked by the ETL INSERT. This is a single-head blocker pattern with no secondary blockers. The ETL is holding a key lock while inserting and the OLTP app queries are trying to read the same rows. Claude should recommend either scheduling the ETL outside business hours or using READ_COMMITTED_SNAPSHOT isolation to eliminate the lock conflict.
